symbols.content: Inhaled Corticosteroids (ICSs) are first-line treatment for persistent asthma.
symbols.provenance:
# Resolved Manual

## Original Text Hash: e93001f2

## Initial Repairs

symbols.content: ICSs are most effective for long-term control of persistent asthma.
symbols.provenance:
# Resolved Manual

## Original Text Hash: e93001f2

## Initial Repairs

symbols.content: ICSs reduce chronic airway inflammation directly in the lungs.
symbols.provenance:
# Resolved Manual

## Original Text Hash: e93001f2

## Red-team Targeted Fixes

symbols.content: ICSs should be taken daily to prevent symptoms and attacks.
symbols.provenance:
# Resolved Manual

## Original Text Hash: e93001f2

## Initial Repairs

symbols.content: ICSs are proven effective for asthma control.
symbols.provenance:
# Resolved Manual

## Original Text Hash: e93001f2

## Initial Repairs

symbols.content: ICSs are generally safe at prescribed doses.
symbols.provenance:
# Resolved Manual

## Original Text Hash: e93001f2

## Red-team Targeted Fixes

symbols.content: Common side effects of ICSs include throat irritation and hoarseness.
symbols.provenance:
# Resolved Manual

## Original Text Hash: e93001f2

## Red-team Targeted Fixes

symbols.content: Using a spacer device can minimize ICS side effects.
symbols.provenance:
# Resolved Manual

## Original Text Hash: e93001f2

## Red-team Targeted Fixes

symbols.content: ICSs may slightly affect linear growth rate.
symbols.provenance:
# Resolved Manual

## Original Text Hash: e93001f2

## Red-team Targeted Fixes

symbols.content: The growth effect from ICSs is usually small and not progressive.
symbols.provenance:
# Resolved Manual

## Original Text Hash: e93001f2

## Red-team Targeted Fixes

symbols.content: ICSs are safe during pregnancy when needed.
symbols.provenance:
# Resolved Manual

## Original Text Hash: e93001f2

## Red-team Targeted Fixes

symbols.content: ICSs are not addictive and not similar to anabolic steroids.
symbols.provenance:
# Resolved Manual

## Original Text Hash: e93001f2

## Red-team Targeted Fixes

symbols.content: ICSs should be used at the lowest effective dose.
symbols.provenance:
# Resolved Manual

## Original Text Hash: e93001f2

## Red-team Targeted Fixes

symbols.content: Correct inhaler technique is essential for ICS effectiveness.
symbols.provenance:
# Resolved Manual

## Original Text Hash: e93001f2

## Red-team Targeted Fixes

symbols.content: Uncontrolled asthma can have a significant impact on growth.
symbols.provenance:
# Resolved Manual

## Original Text Hash: e93001f2

## Red-team Targeted Fixes

symbols.content: Laboratory (LABAs) must be used only in combination with ICSs.
symbols.provenance:
# Resolved Manual

## Original Text Hash: e93001f2

## Red-team Targeted Fixes

symbols.content: LABAs relax airway muscles for extended periods.
symbols.provenance:
# Resolved Manual

## Original Text Hash: e93001f2

## Red-team Targeted Fixes

symbols.content: LABAs improve lung function when combined with ICSs.
symbols.provenance:
# Resolved Manual

## Original Text Hash: e93001f2

## Red-team Targeted Fixes

symbols.content: LABAs reduce asthma attacks and SABA use when combined with ICSs.
symbols.provenance:
# Resolved Manual

## Original Text Hash: e93001f2

## Red-team Targeted Fixes

symbols.content: FDA has issued a Black Box warning for LABAs due to increased risk of severe exacerbations.
symbols.provenance:
# Resolved Manual

## Original Text Hash: e93001f2

## Red-team Targeted Fixes

symbols.content: FDA Black Box warning includes risk of asthma attacks and deaths.
symbols.provenance:
# Resolved Manual

## Original Text Hash: e93001f2

## Red-team Targeted Fixes

symbols.content: Laba should not be used at maximum dose without ICS.
symbols.provenance:
# Resolved Manual

## Original Text Hash: e93001f2

## Red-team Targeted Fixes

symbols.content: Healthcare providers should stay updated on asthma management guidelines.
symbols.provenance:
